name: Fresh Pinto Beans with Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 large Ripe tomatoes; peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell the beans and rinse them well. Place in a saucepan with enough water to cover. Bring to a boil for 15 minutes.
2. Drain the beans and return them to the pan. Add oil, onions, tomatoes, paprika, cumin, garlic, 1/2 teaspoon salt, pepper and water. Cover and cook over low heat until beans are tender, about one hour.
3. Taste for seasoning and add more salt if needed. If tomatoes are too acidic, add enough sugar to balance the flavor.
4. Turn off the heat and season with lemon juice. Transfer beans and juices to a serving dish. Garnish with parsley and cilantro.
